doc_title: California State Bar Emergency Access to Justice Protocol 2025 (EAJP-2025)
label: fabricated
reason: The California State Bar has no "Legal Services Trust Fund Commission" with regulatory authority to waive unauthorized practice of law statutes, and no such emergency protocol exists in official records.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The California State Bar has no "Legal Services Trust Fund Commission" with regulatory authority to waive unauthorized practice of law statutes, and no such emergency protocol (EAJP-2025) exists in official State Bar records or Business & Professions Code provisions.
